message:
feat(credential-broker): wire config into broker and add Display for CredentialScope

Fix three gaps in the credential broker module (ft-3681t.5.5):

1. Add Display impl for CredentialScope (format: "provider:resource[ops]")
   so it can be used in format strings like check_connector_access
2. Wire CredentialBrokerConfig values (max_audit_events,
   max_leases_per_connector) into ConnectorCredentialBroker via from_config
   instead of ignoring them and using hardcoded constants
3. Add 12 unit tests for config-driven behavior, Display format, and
   check_connector_access logic; add 3 property tests for config serde
   roundtrip, configurable audit capacity, and scope Display format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
